title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Phone Settings Button(Android)
scenario: Phone Settings button on Device Home Screen does not navigate to Bluetooth settings when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the Home screen, ensure no device is connected.
3. Tap the Phone Settings button (gear icon) located on the Home screen.
expected: The user is taken to the device's Bluetooth settings page.
